title: CannizzoOW Cobblemon
description: A modpack that I use on stream, for my subs and close friends.
body:
This Modpack was created to help me as the creator to update and downgrade more easily. 

Custom License for CannizzoOW Cobblemon
1. General Information
This modpack is a collection of third-party mods and configurations assembled to enhance the gameplay experience. I do not own any of the included mods, and they are not directly redistributed in this modpack. All mods are downloaded from official sources via Modrinth.

2. Usage Permissions
✅ You are allowed to:

Use this modpack freely for private gameplay and streaming.
Share this modpack with others as long as it is done through the official Modrinth page.
Modify configurations for personal use.

3. Restrictions
🚫 No commercial use – This modpack cannot be sold or used in paid services without permission.
🚫 Do not redistribute the mods directly – Each mod has its own license. Check the mod's Modrinth or CurseForge page for licensing information.
🚫 Do not claim ownership – I do not own the individual mods, only the assembly of the modpack.

4. Disclaimer
This modpack is provided "as is", without any warranties. I am not responsible for any issues, data loss, or compatibility problems that may arise from using it.
